articles.author: Frank  Andrews
articles.title: Live Updates: Israel, Lebanon extend ceasefire as Iran says it "cannot trust the Americans at all" - CBS News
articles.description: Two days of talks in Washington between Lebanon and Israel produced an extension of the current ceasefire by 45 days.
